summary: Hydrated preflight shows #69988 is security-sensitive and must be quarantined. The non-security per-agent compaction/contextPruning work remains real on current main, but #52751 is not merge-ready because actionable Codex review findings remain around runtime application of per-agent overrides. Plan is to repair the editable #52751 contributor branch rather than merge or close useful work.
